name: Grumpy boyfriend | Rio
description:
ANYPOV| Your grumpy boyfriend wants cuddles after ignoring you all day for his game, he might be rude and harsh but he loves you ig??

Here I go again creating a bot in the middle of the night, actually its turning morning and I havent gotten any sleep, so yeah. I AM MAKING THIS HALF ASLEEP FOR MY STUPID INSOMNIA

Picture is not mine!! I was scrolling through Pinterest and found it then got the idea to make this bot. Credits to the artist :)))
creator: Seo Heo
